examples.text:
and it's found in a wide variety
of food and drink. Just check the labels
on sweet products you buy. Glucose, fructose, sucrose, maltose, lactose, dextrose, and starch are all forms of sugar.
examples.explanation: 它广泛存在于各种食物和饮料中。只需查看你购买的甜味产品上的标签。葡萄糖、果糖、蔗糖、麦芽糖、乳糖、右旋糖和淀粉都是糖的形式。

source.text: 糖类怎样影响大脑 -Nicole Avena

reviewSessions.example_text: and it's found in a wide variety of food and drink. Just check the labels on sweet products you buy. Glucose, fructose, sucrose, maltose, lactose, dextrose, and starch are all forms of sugar.
reviewSessions.user_answer: 一种糖，不知道 glu 前缀
reviewSessions.feedback: 答案大体正确，glucose 确实是一种糖，具体指“葡萄糖”。前缀不影响本词释义掌握。
missing_points: 未明确说出“葡萄糖”这一准确中文释义

reviewSessions.example_text: and it's found in a wide variety of food and drink. Just check the labels on sweet products you buy. Glucose, fructose, sucrose, maltose, lactose, dextrose, and starch are all forms of sugar.
reviewSessions.feedback: 这次没填对，正确答案是 Glucose。
missing_points: 需要回忆出目标词 Glucose

reviewSessions.example_text: and it's found in a wide variety of food and drink. Just check the labels on sweet products you buy. Glucose, fructose, sucrose, maltose, lactose, dextrose, and starch are all forms of sugar.
reviewSessions.feedback: 和正确答案 Glucose 很接近，像是拼写或形式差了一点。
